CONSTITUTIONAL_GATE_HEALTHY.description: ENT-000388 (Constitutional Gate) must be ACTIVE — system integrity depends on it

NO_ORPHANED_RELATIONSHIPS.description: All relationship endpoints must reference registered entities

GOVERNED_MIGRATION_APPROVED.description: Governed migrations must not be stuck at PROPOSED or VALIDATED — they must reach APPROVED or beyond

ACTIVE_SERVICE_MONITORED.description: All ACTIVE SERVICE/MIDDLEWARE/API entities must have a SYNC monitoring projection

GOV_ENTITY_DOCUMENTED.description: All GOV-family entities must have a SYNC documentation projection

ACTIVE_FILE_IN_REPO.description: All ACTIVE FILE/ROUTE/MIDDLEWARE entities must be tracked in git (repository projection SYNC)

HIGH_IMPACT_ENTITY_DOCUMENTED.description: Entities classified CRITICAL or HIGH impact risk must have a SYNC documentation projection
